body: Seeing this too — a caseworker in my last cohort hit the same error during a home-visit demo. Thanks for picking it up, Hector.
+1 on the PDF export. Printable checklists would be huge for the folks I train.
Added a retry with exponential backoff. Will keep an eye on the queue over the weekend.
Merged. Thanks again for the quick fix.
Going with this section order: kinship first, then licensing. Will draft this week.
